title: lupinus paniculatus var. paniculatus
intro: Lupinus paniculatus var. paniculatus, also known as Lupin or Blue Lupin, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lupin include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive and immune system function. Lupin is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean and European regions.
